sample_prompts: separate this horn from the head so it stops clipping through
clean up the overlap between these two parts with a small bounded push
rozdziel te dwa elementy bo teraz sie przenikaja
usun przeciecie tej czesci z korpusem bez przebudowy calego ukladu
description: Bounded cleanup macro that separates one overlapping pair by inferring a stable cleanup axis/side when possible and applying one limited push toward contact or a small gap. Prefer this over ad hoc manual transforms when the problem is obvious pairwise intersection rather than broader reconstruction.
